histogram.name: MultistepFilter.Acceptance
histogram.summary: Records the overall user acceptance outcome (from Cue or Omnibox) for Multistep Filter suggestion. Recorded when the user accepts, dismisses, or opens settings for a Multistep Filter suggestion, or when the user ignores the suggestion upon navigating away or closing the tab.

histogram.name: MultistepFilter.Acceptance.ByTask.{TaskType}
histogram.summary: Records the overall user acceptance outcome (from Cue or Omnibox) for Multistep Filter suggestion for task type {TaskType}. Recorded when the user accepts, dismisses, or opens settings for a Multistep Filter suggestion, or when the user ignores the suggestion upon navigating away or closing the tab.

histogram.name: MultistepFilter.Acceptance.InitialCue
histogram.summary: Records the user acceptance outcome on the initial cue for Multistep Filter suggestion. Recorded when the user interacts with the initial cue bubble (accepts, dismisses, or opens settings) or when the cue bubble times out and collapses into the Omnibox.

histogram.name: MultistepFilter.Acceptance.InitialCue.ByTask.{TaskType}
histogram.summary: Records the user acceptance outcome on the initial cue for Multistep Filter suggestion for task type {TaskType}. Recorded when the user interacts with the initial cue bubble (accepts, dismisses, or opens settings) or when the cue bubble times out and collapses into the Omnibox.

histogram.name: MultistepFilter.Acceptance.ReopenedCue
histogram.summary: Records user acceptance outcome with the Multistep Filter suggestion cue (after it is reopened from the Omnibox). Recorded when the user interacts with a reopened Omnibox suggestion (accepts, dismisses, or opens settings) or when the user ignores the Omnibox suggestion upon navigating away or closing the tab.

histogram.name: MultistepFilter.Acceptance.ReopenedCue.ByTask.{TaskType}
histogram.summary: Records user acceptance outcome with the Multistep Filter suggestion cue (after it is reopened from the Omnibox) for task type {TaskType}. Recorded when the user interacts with a reopened Omnibox suggestion (accepts, dismisses, or opens settings) or when the user ignores the Omnibox suggestion upon navigating away or closing the tab.
